channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: El-Rufai's Wife Pleads for Fair Treatment Amid Legal Challenges
item.description: Hajiya Asiya El-Rufai, wife of former Kaduna State Governor, has publicly appealed to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu to ensure her husband, El-Rufai, receives fair treatment amid ongoing legal proceeding...

item.title: SIT Investigates Anil Mishra's Role in Failure to Enforce Frisking Norms at Ram Temple Donation Event
item.description: The Special Investigation Team (SIT) has launched an inquiry into the alleged negligence of Anil Mishra, a key figure in the Ram Temple donation management, for failing to enforce frisking norms durin...

item.title: Park Ji-hoon's Manila Concert Canceled, Moved to Macau
item.description: The Manila concert of South Korean actor Park Ji-hoon, known for his role in the K-drama 'Weak Hero Class,' has been canceled. Originally scheduled to take place in Manila, the event's venue has been ...

item.title: San Diego Deputy Sentenced to Prison for Civil Rights Violations and Cover-Up
item.description: Jeremiah Manuyag Flores, 45, a former deputy with the San Diego County Sheriff’s Department, was sentenced to 57 months in federal prison for violating the civil rights of a pretrial detainee. Prosecu...

item.title: Ambulance and Transport Truck Collision Near Confederation Bridge Claims Three Lives
item.description: A tragic collision occurred near the Confederation Bridge in New Brunswick on Tuesday morning, resulting in the deaths of three individuals. The incident involved an ambulance from Prince Edward Islan...

item.title: Hamas' political shift and ongoing ceasefire challenges in Gaza
item.description: Hamas has announced the dissolution of its governing body in Gaza, marking a significant political change after nearly two decades of civilian rule. The move aims to facilitate the transfer of adminis...

item.title: James Ford creates album during leukemia treatment, reflects on life and mortality
item.description: James Ford, the former Simian Mobile Disco member, has shared insights into creating his new album 'Lost In Another World' while undergoing chemotherapy for acute myeloid leukemia. The album, released...

item.title: Public Protector Report Highlights Systemic Failures in Cape Town's Municipal Services to Khayelitsha and Langa Residents
item.description: The Public Protector has found that the City of Cape Town failed to provide basic municipal services to residents of Langa Flats and parts of Khayelitsha, concluding that years of shortcomings in hous...

item.title: OPEC+ Introduces Policies to Lower Global Oil Prices
item.description: OPEC+, the alliance of oil-producing nations led by Saudi Arabia and Russia, has introduced new policies aimed at reducing global oil prices. This shift marks a departure from previous strategies focu...

item.title: House Prosecution Presents Marcos' Reaction Video in Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: During the second day of Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial, the House prosecution team presented a video of President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. reacting to her alleged remark about...

item.title: Democratic Opponent Issues Cease-and-Desist Against Rep. Fitzpatrick's False FBI Investigation Claims
item.description: Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick (R-PA) faces a cease-and-desist order from his Democratic opponent, Bucks County Commissioner Bob Harvie, over campaign ads alleging Harvie is under an FBI investigation for ste...

item.title: Zanzibar's Rival Parties Sign Reconciliation Accord to Promote Unity and Peace
item.description: Zanzibar is set to take a significant step towards political reconciliation as President Hussein Ali Mwinyi and ACT-Wazalendo national chairman Mr Othman Masoud Othman sign a joint accord aimed at str...

item.title: Regional trains in Victoria disrupted by Telstra network outage
item.description: A widespread Telstra mobile network outage has caused significant disruptions to regional train services across Victoria, with the entire V/Line network shut down. Commuters faced delays and stranded ...

item.title: Royals' Three Errors Lead to Mets' Surprising Home Run in Opening Game
item.description: The Kansas City Royals committed a historic three-error meltdown during a critical play against the New York Mets, gifting the Mets an unexpected three-run lead in their July 7 matchup. Mets outfielde...

item.title: Iran-US tensions escalate as missiles target commercial ships in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The situation in the Strait of Hormuz has intensified following reports that Iran's Revolutionary Guards fired at least two missiles at commercial ships transiting the critical waterway. The attacks, ...

item.title: Marina Mabrey becomes Toronto Tempo's first All-Star in historic WNBA season
item.description: Marina Mabrey has emerged as a standout player in the WNBA, becoming the first athlete in the Toronto Tempo's history to earn All-Star recognition. Her breakout season has been marked by exceptional p...

item.title: Mitchells Plain footballer Naeem Toyer dies during league match, community mourns
item.description: A memorial service for 20-year-old Standards United FC player Naeem Toyer, who died during a Second Division League match at Westridge Sports Complex, will be held at Merrydale Primary School. Toyer c...

item.title: Homeless Texas woman rescued after days trapped in ravine
item.description: A homeless Texas woman has been rescued after spending several days trapped in mud and sewage at the bottom of a ravine. The incident occurred on June 28, with temperatures reaching 104 degrees Fahren...

item.title: UK and Canada Explore Merging Defense Financing Initiatives
item.description: The United Kingdom and Canada are discussing the possibility of merging their defense financing initiatives, with neither country yet committing to a unified approach. UK Chancellor Rachel Reeves has ...

item.title: Ondo Police Deploy Security to Prevent Cult Activities and Ensure Public Safety
